svg.aria-label: All 18 OmniRoute combo routing strategies, each tile animating the flow it executes: priority drains the first target then the next; fill-first fills a target's quota before moving on; weighted picks randomly by weight; round-robin cycles targets in order; p2c picks two random targets and routes to the lighter one; least-used picks the lowest current load; random picks uniformly; strict-random allows repeats; cost-optimized routes to the cheapest request; headroom picks the most remaining quota; reset-window prefers the quota window resetting soonest; reset-aware ranks by reset time, short windows first; context-relay hands off long context across targets; context-optimized fits the current context size; lkgp sticks to the last successful target; auto scores every connection on 12 live factors; fusion fans out to a panel and a judge synthesizes one answer; pipeline chains steps so each output feeds the next.
svg.desc: Animated grid of 18 routing-strategy tiles; static tracks show each flow on the first frame while a small dot repeatedly travels the path each strategy takes.

text.font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', Arial, Helvetica, system-ui, sans-serif

svg.text: ● request → ▮ targets — each tile animates the path its strategy takes · green outline = the pick

text.font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', Arial, Helvetica, system-ui, sans-serif

g.text: fill T1’s quota, then move on
